content.en:
This day.

Ye Tian went to the gray fog area, and he was ready to go deeper.

There were many fog beasts in the gray fog area. These fog beasts were not weak, and some were even comparable to the Eternal Ultimate Palace Master.

The reason why there are so many Eternal Ultimate Palace Masters is entirely because the transformed fog beasts can absorb the energy of the fog and continue to grow.

Because of this, the Eternal Ultimate Palace Masters of this time and space line can't solve the problem of the gray fog area at all, and it is difficult to cross the gray fog area.

If these fog beasts can come out at will and have wisdom, the creatures of this time and space line would have been destroyed long ago.

But Ye Tian also had a guess in his heart, that is, this time and space line does not have the saying of the end of the catastrophe, but there is the saying of the great catastrophe. The last great catastrophe was the birth of the gray fog area, so the next great catastrophe is very likely to be the fog beasts in the gray fog area rushing out.

If that happens, countless lives will perish, the Ultimate Palace Masters will die, and even many Eternal Ultimate Palace Masters will be killed.

And as time goes by, the strength of those fog beasts will become stronger and stronger, and will eventually form a disaster comparable to the final catastrophe, completely destroying this time and space line!

At present, the strong men of this time and space line cannot solve this problem, and it seems that they will eventually face the end of the time and space line.

Of course, this time is still very long, because this time and space line is still young, unlike the time and space line where he is, which has entered the final stage.

…

Deep in the gray fog area.

Ye Tian came here and encountered some fog beasts, but with his strength, he easily killed those fog beasts.

However, on this day, he encountered a very terrifying fog beast, which was absolutely comparable to the Eternal Ultimate Palace Master, and it was not an ordinary Eternal Ultimate Palace Master.

Boom! ! ! !

Ye Tian fought with him, and their strength was equal. He protected himself with the Extreme Blood Armor and held the Extreme Blood Blade, and continued to fight with him. The terrifying power tore through time and space, and slashed at the opponent again and again, but only left a trace. The opponent recovered in a breath and could not hurt the opponent at all.

And the attack of the fog beast also cracked the Extreme Blood Armor on his body, and the attack power was also extremely terrifying!

After fighting for a long time, Ye Tian roughly judged the opponent's strength and finally chose to fight with more people.

Buzz! ! ! ! (accg)!

One after another, the cloned bodies appeared. In fact, his body was also a cloned body. He would not let the real clone take risks.

His real clone was still in seclusion in the Fog Pavilion!

Multiple clones attacked together, besieged the fog beast, easily beat him, and soon broke the fog beast's defense and tore the fog beast apart in an instant.

However, the fog beast recovered easily and entered a special form.

I saw countless fogs being absorbed by it, and it entered a seemingly incomplete fog form. Both its speed and strength increased dramatically, and its recovery ability was very strong.Very terrifying.

"Similar to the final form, but much weaker than the final form!"

Ye Tian said secretly.

Even though the fog beast was many times stronger, he was still not afraid. He fought with it, sacrificed a copy of his body, and continued to condense.

As time passed, the fog beast was finally killed by Ye Tian.

Afterwards,

Ye Tian took the corpse of the fog beast for research, mainly to study this incomplete atomized form. He knew that this form should be a castrated version, otherwise it would definitely not be limited to this.

In this way, he studied for a long time, and at the same time obtained a large amount of resources and special things in the gray fog area.

In addition, he killed many fog beasts with this incomplete atomized form, and different fog beasts had different atomized forms, some were very weak, and some were very powerful.

After studying for a long time, he has a good understanding of this incomplete mist form, but he can't use it now, unless he actively absorbs the gray mist to practice, but this incomplete mist form is meaningless and can't improve his strength. Only the truly complete mist form can help him improve his strength.

After a period of time, Ye Tian went deep into the gray fog area and finally found the real good stuff.

"That is..."

Ye Tian looked at an ancient stone tablet in front of him, which contained a wonderful power, and many fog beasts were comprehending here.

He frowned slightly. If he could copy the fog beast, he could blend in to comprehend it, but he didn't dare to copy the body of the fog beast because he felt it was very dangerous, so he gave up this plan.

"Then take this ancient stone tablet!"

Immediately.

Ye Tian sent out a copy of his body to kill the fog beasts and fight with them. These copies were all sacrifices. He needed another copy to steal the ancient stone tablet.

Boom! ! ! !

The killing began, and it was very cruel. Even though Ye Tian's copy was very powerful, there were many fog beasts here, and there were at least more than 20 fog beasts comparable to the Eternal Ultimate Palace Master, and some of them were even stronger than Ye Tian.

So, he fought madly and held them back at all costs.

Finally, Ye Tian found an opportunity. A copy of his body came to the ancient stone tablet, pulled it up with all his strength, and then took it in and grabbed the ancient stone tablet and quickly escaped.

It is worth mentioning that this ancient stone tablet cannot be taken into the body, nor can it be collected with any space treasure, so it can only be held in the hand. (To read the exciting novels, go to Faloo Novel Network!)

When the fog beasts saw Ye Tian taking the ancient stone tablet, they went crazy and wanted to chase and kill Ye Tian, ​​but they were held back by Ye Tian's cloned bodies.

Along the way, more and more fog beasts chased and killed Ye Tian, ​​but Ye Tian sent his other cloned bodies to support him in time, sacrificing one clone after another, and finally he rushed out of the gray fog area with the ancient stone tablet, and those fog beasts could notDare to rush out to chase and kill, can only choose to give up.

...

Somewhere in the foggy area.

Ye Tian built a mansion of his own alone, where he comprehended the ancient stone tablet.

He found that this ancient stone tablet was very extraordinary, not only helping him to comprehend the rules of the eternal ultimate palace, but also helping him to study the atomization form.

So in the days that followed, he focused on comprehending this ancient stone tablet.

However, after comprehending for a long time, he would still be affected by the stone tablet and turned into a fog beast.

So, he had to sacrifice one copy of his body after another.

In this way, over time, Ye Tian's realm of the eternal ultimate palace rules became higher and higher. Finally, after a long time, he successfully comprehended the eternal ultimate palace rules to the perfect realm, and the true body in another time and space also comprehended the ultimate rules of the ten thousand laws.

Not only that, Ye Tian also completely perfected the atomization form. Now he only needs to absorb the gray fog to master the atomization form!

However, the general gray fog is very weak, and the atomized form is naturally not strong. He plans to go deep into the deepest part of the gray fog area to absorb the most terrifying gray fog. .
